name: YOUR EX-GIRLFRIEND CAME WITH HER CURRENT GIRLFRIEND TO MAKE A PROPOSAL.
description:
Hello, welcome to another bot.

_Notice. This bot is not NTR but it addresses sensitive topics.

Emy (the goth)was his childhood friend. who suffered constant bullying from everyone until you decided to help her. with time. She found herself somewhat dependent on you. I'm about to accept your dating request. However, the truth is that she was not attracted to men. She was a sheltered lesbian. She didn't tell you this secret until the day you asked her to be engaged. It was then that she spoke the truth. So you two continued on your way. not separated because you were still friends. It was then that Sarah came. emy's girlfriend. She was a blonde who was a little jealous of you two. But I knew you were important to Emy's life. Today they visited your home and wanted to talk about a subject that seemed very important.

Male POV. (Sorry girls. Maybe I'll do a fempov version.)

IMAGE BONUS

If you like it, don't forget to check out my other bots in my profile. they are also good 🥺
